lekpkj i=ksa ¼ftuesa ls ,d LFkkuh; Hkk"kk esa gksxk½ esa izdkf’kr djsxk] ftlesa bl vf/klwpuk ds mica/kksa ds vuqlkj okf.kfT;d izpkyu dh rkjh[k dk Hkh mYys[k gksxk vkSj ,slk lkj] bl vf/klwpuk ds vuqlkj iqujhf{kr Qhl dks izHkkoh djus ds fy, nl fnu igys Hkh iqu% izdkf’kr fd;k tk,xkA [Qk-la- Hkkjkjkizk@13013@421@lhvks@08&09@thlh&gSnjkckn ¼tMpsjyk&dksVdVk½ chvksVh] vyds'k 'kekZ] la;qDr lfpo -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 16th March, 2015 S.O. 768(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 8A of the National Highway Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with rule 3 of the National Highways (collection of Fees by any person for the use of section of National Highway/permanent bridge/temporary bridge on National Highway) Rules, 1997, the Central Government hereby makes the following amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the erstwhile Ministry of Shipping, Road Transport and Highways (Department of Road Transport and Highways) number S.O. 412(E), dated the 06th February, 2009, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), namely:— In the said notification, under the SCHEDULE In place of existing Para Shall be substituted as i) The Concessionaire shall collect and retain the fees on category of vehicles specified in column (2) of the Table below, for the use of the said section at the rate of base fee specified in Column (3) of the said Table. i) The Concessionaire shall collect and retain the fees on category of vehicles specified in column (2) of the Table below, for the use of the said section at the rate of base fee specified in Column (3) of the said Table for a length of 55.74 Km. ii) The fee shall be collected at the Toll Plaza at Km.114.087 ii) The fee shall be collected at the Toll Plaza at Km.114.087 for a length of 55.74 Km. Notes (8) The Concessionaire shall publish substance of this notification in two local newspapers (one of which shall be vernacular language), which shall also state the date of commercial operation as per the provisions of this notification, at least ten days prior to the date of commercial operation and such substance shall also be repeated, ten days prior to giving effect to revision of fee in accordance with this notification. Notes (8) The Concessionaire shall publish substance of this notification and scheme of discount to frequent and local users as provided in the Concession Agreement in two local newspapers (one of which shall be vernacular language), which shall also state the date of commercial operation as per the provisions of this notification, at least ten days prior to the date of commercial operation and such substance shall also be repeated, ten days prior to giving effect to revision of fee in accordance with this notification. [F. No. NHAI/13013/421/CO/08-09/GC-Hyderabad (Jadcherla-Kotakatta) BOT] ALKESH SHARMA, Jt.
